name: radial_params
description: Reference-parity: radial-falloff distance metric across parameters. Seg-4 cube scaled along Y under a radial linear falloff with: a shrink factor (<1), an off-centre falloff (center.x=0.3), an anisotropic ellipsoid (sizeY=1.5), and a larger sphere (size=2). Confirms vibe3d's ellipsoid metric t=sqrt(sum((d_i/size_i)^2)) matches the reference. Empty reset.
source: Frozen reference capture (radial falloff, real-GL session; captured from a reference session via the private capture tooling).

provenance.harness: private capture tooling (generator script outside tools/local/fixture_gen/)
provenance.notes: Radial-falloff family generated by manual_vnc_kit/gen_radial_fixtures.py (a real private generator OUTSIDE tools/local/fixture_gen/ — not part of this task's Phase-2 write-time-guard/stamping scope, which is limited to the 12 fixture_gen/*/gen.py dirs + central gen.py + stage_from_probe.py). Real-GL captured reference session via the private capture tooling.
